title: slideotter
summary: A local browser studio for structured decks with fast previews, deliberate edits, and one DOM render path.
note: The project turns deck work into a tight loop: plan, edit, compare, apply, validate.

cards.title: Readable specs
cards.body: Slides stay as compact JSON so content, intent, and edits remain reviewable.

cards.title: Shared rendering
cards.body: The same DOM renderer powers preview, comparison, validation, and export.

cards.title: Guarded changes
cards.body: Generated options stay temporary until the author compares and applies one.
